---
title: "Statistical Modelling Process"
author:
  - Mikis Stasinopoulos
  - Bob Rigby
  - Fernanda de Bastiani
  - Julian Merder
---

This website contain talks and material given to reseach group of Greenwich University (UK) and  to the IWSM, July 2026 in Oslo - Norway.

- This is a longer version of the [talk](StatisticalModelling_talk.qmd) given to the  to the $M^3$Impact research group of the University of Greenwich.

- This is the  actual [IWSM talk](IWSM_talk.qmd). 

https://mstasinopoulos.github.io/talk_Oslo_2026/
